name: house-rules
description: An opinionated baseline for software craft: naming, testing, and programming doctrine in the tradition of Beck, Martin, and Fowler. These are chosen conventions among defensible options, not universal law. Skills: programming-philosophy, testing-philosophy, naming-is-hard.
